name: Coles Group Limited.
analysis: COL has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 3% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$23.1400. Trade idea: entry A$23.5100, stop A$21.0474, target A$30.8978 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
